| [github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface) | require | patch | `v0.6.0` -> `v0.6.1` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface (github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface)</summary>

### [`v0.6.1`](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/releases/tag/v0.6.1)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/compare/v0.6.0...v0.6.1)

#### What's Changed

-   minor documentation improvements by [@​tariq1890](https://togithub.com/tariq1890) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/146](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/146)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec from 1.1.0-rc.1 to 1.1.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/148](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/148)
-   log the unresolved CDI devices only by [@​tariq1890](https://togithub.com/tariq1890) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/153](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/153)
-   Add cncf tags required files by [@​elezar](https://togithub.com/elezar) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/151](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/151)
-   Update README.md by [@​mikebrow](https://togithub.com/mikebrow) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/155](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/155)
-   build(deps): bump actions/checkout from 3 to 4 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/159](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/159)
-   pkg/cdi: remove github.com/opencontainers/runc/libcontainer dependency by [@​thaJeztah](https://togithub.com/thaJeztah) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/158](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/158)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​tariq1890](https://togithub.com/tariq1890) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/146](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/146)
-   [@​mikebrow](https://togithub.com/mikebrow) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/155](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/155)
-   [@​thaJeztah](https://togithub.com/thaJeztah) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/158](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/158)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/compare/v0.6.0...v0.6.1

</details>
